question: The line chart shows revenue by year. Which of the following statements is true based on the chart?

options.A: Revenue increased each year and 2020 has the highest revenue.
options.C: Revenue in 2019 is higher than in 2020.

explanation: The y-axis maximum is set below the data maximum, so the top three bars are clipped and appear equal; the true values cannot be compared from the chart alone.
